notes: small outrunner brushless weapon motor; 3-phase winding modelled as an equivalent 2-wire interface (same simplification as brushless-esc-weapon) — real per-phase commutation current isn't simulated, just the worst-case stall draw a power budget needs to catch.
description: The weapon motor: spins a disc, bar, or drum at high RPM. Draws far more current under a stall (a jam, a hit) than a drive motor ever does — exactly the worst case E30/E31 exist to catch.
